title: Test shared semantic memory integration end to end
description: Add and update automated tests covering backend initialization, semantic CRUD/search, ingestion and deduplication, runner env injection, planner spec ingestion, onboarding bootstrap, and CLI-visible behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover `init_db()` idempotency and WAL-ready bootstrap behavior.
Tests cover `add_entry()` plus `search()` round-trip behavior, including all-namespace search output.
Tests cover `ingest_file()` chunking and deduplication behavior.
Tests cover env injection for both runner backends, including standalone bead behavior.
Tests cover planner spec ingestion including non-fatal failure handling.
Tests cover onboarding overwrite/bootstrap behavior as needed for the new init flow.
The relevant test suite passes with `uv run pytest tests/ -n auto -q`.
